title: java-gradle-build
text: Gradle Java build checks. If gradlew exists, prefer .\gradlew.bat on Windows or ./gradlew on Unix. Use .\gradlew.bat compileJava for a quick compile check when available. Use .\gradlew.bat test for unit tests. Use .\gradlew.bat build for full verification. For multi-project builds, use :module:test or :module:build. If dependencies are missing and network is restricted, report that dependency download is blocked instead of guessing.
